passive.name: Perseverance
passive.description: If Garen has not recently been struck by damage or enemy abilities, he regenerates a percentage of his total health each second.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{ci|Garen}} continually {{sti|health regeneration|regenerates}} a portion of his {{sti|health|{{as|'''maximum''' health}}}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: This ability is temporarily disabled if he is attacked by epic {{tip|monsters}}, enemy {{tip|turrets}}, or enemy {{tip|champions}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Garen''' {{sti|health regeneration|link=true|regenerates}}{{ft|{{as|{{pp|key=%|1.5+0.2*(x-1) for 6;then + 0.8*x for 7; then + 0.4*x|formula=1.3%+0.2 per level up to level 6, then+0.8% up to level 13, then+0.4%}} of his {{sti|'''maximum''' health}}}} every 5 seconds.|{{as|{{pp|key=%|(1.5+0.2*(x-1))/10 for 6;then + 0.8/10*x for 7; then + 0.4/10*x|formula=0.13%+0.02% per level up to level 6, then+0.08% up to level 13, then+0.04%}} of his {{sti|'''maximum''' health}}}} every {{fd|0.5}} seconds.}}
wiki_detail.description2: ''Perseverance'' is lost for {{tt|8 seconds|Not a cooldown, unaffected by ability haste}} if '''Garen''' takes damage from {{tip|champion|champions}}, epic {{tip|monster|monsters}}, or {{tip|turret|turrets}}, or if he is hit by an enemy [[Champion ability|ability]] or affected by an enemy [[summoner spell]], refreshing on subsequent damage and hits taken from them.
wiki_detail.notes: * ''Perseverance'' does not go on nor refresh its cooldown from damage which was fully prevented by a {{tip|shield}} or {{tip|invulnerability}}.

Q.name: Decisive Strike
Q.description: Garen gains a burst of Move Speed, breaking free of all slows affecting him. His next attack strikes a vital area of his foe, dealing bonus damage and silencing them.
Q.tooltip:
Garen removes all Slowing effects on him and gains {{ movementspeedamount*100 }}% Move Speed for {{ movementspeedduration }} second(s).

His next Attack Silences for {{ silenceduration }} seconds and does {{ totaldamage }} physical damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb2: His next {{tip|basic attack}} will {{tip|lunge}} and deal {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}, {{tip|silence|silencing}} the target.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Garen''' {{tip|cleanse|cleanses}} himself of all {{tip|slow|slows}} and gains {{sti|ms|{{as|35% '''bonus''' movement speed}}}} for a duration.
wiki_detail.description2: Additionally, '''Garen''' empowers his next [[basic attack]] within {{fd|4.5}} seconds to have an {{tip|uncancellable windup}}, {{tip|lunge}} at the target, deal {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}, and {{tip|silence}} them for {{fd|1.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Decisive Strike {{tip|basic attack reset|resets}} '''Garen's''' basic attack timer.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* The enhanced attack will apply other [[on-hit effect]]s and can {{tip|critical strike|critically strike}} as normal (the bonus damage does not).
** The bonus damage will also apply {{sti|life steal}}.
** The bonus damage is applied to [[structures]].
* ''Decisive Strike'' locks '''Garen''' out of using basic attacks for a short period of time. This is shortened with {{stil|attack speed}}.
* The enhanced attack will still complete and hit the target even if they become {{tip|untargetable}} during the {{tip|attack windup|attack's windup}}.
* ''Decisive Strike'' will not prevent the reapplication of {{tip|slow|slows}} (e.g. the persistent slow from {{ai|Pillar of Ice|Trundle}} will be immediately reapplied after removal if '''Garen''' is still within its [[area of effect]]).
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will only negate the {{tip|silence}}.
* ''Decisive Strike's'' {{tip|lunge}} can pass very thin terrain and will otherwise not be able to. In any case, '''Garen''' will still hit his target.

W.name: Courage
W.description: Garen passively increases his Armor and Magic Resist by killing enemies. He may also activate this ability to give him a shield and tenacity for a brief moment followed by a lesser amount of damage reduction for a longer duration.
W.tooltip:
Passive: Garen has {{ resistsfortooltip }} bonus Armor and {{ resistsfortooltip }} bonus Magic Resist. Killing units permanently grants {{ resistgainonkilltooltip }} resists, up to a max of {{ resistmax }}.

Active: Garen steels his courage for {{ drduration }} seconds, reducing incoming damage by {{ drpercent*100 }}%. He also gains {{ totalshield }} Shield and {{ upfronttenacity*100 }}% Tenacity for {{ upfrontduration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} {{ci|Garen}} permanently gains '''bonus''' {{as|{{sti|armor}}}} and {{sti|magic resistance|{{as|magic resist}}}} by killing enemies, up to a cap.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Garen''' reduces incoming damage for a few seconds. He also briefly gains a {{tip|shield}} and increased {{tip|tenacity}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive:}} Whenever '''Garen''' kills an enemy, he generates a [[stack]] of ''Courage'', stacking up to 150 times.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Courage:}} For each stack, '''Garen''' gains {{sti|armor|{{as|{{fd|0.2}} '''bonus''' armor}}}} and {{sti|mr|{{as|{{fd|0.2}} '''bonus''' magic resistance}}}}, up to a maximum of 30 '''bonus''' resistances each.
wiki_detail.description4: For the first {{fd|0.75}} seconds, '''Garen''' additionally grants himself a {{tip|shield}} and 60% {{tip|tenacity}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Courage's'' bonus resistances are only gained when it is ranked up at least once, but ''Courage's'' passive is retroactive for units killed before it was learned.
* ''Courage's'' '''bonus''' resistances can be obtained by any of '''Garen's''' damage sources (basic attacks, abilities, summoner spells, runes, item actives).
** This does not include ''last hits'' transferred to '''Garen''' artificially.
* The kills on these enemy unit types count towards ''Courage's'' '''bonus''' resistances:
** {{tip|champion|Champions}} (Only [[kill]]s, [[Assist]]s don't grant the '''bonus''' resistances)
** All {{tip|minions}} and {{tip|monster|monsters}}
** [[Champion summoned units]] (e.g. {{ai|Noxious Trap|Teemo}}, {{ai|Powder Keg|Gangplank}}, {{ai|Dark Procession|Yorick}})
** All {{tip|pet|pets}} and {{tip|clone|clones}}.
*** The bonus is equal for all these units; ''Large'' units do not grant a larger bonus.
* The kills on these enemy unit types do '''not''' count towards ''Courage's'' '''bonus''' resistances:
** {{tip|Wards}}.
** {{tip|Turrets}} (including {{ai|Shurima's Legacy|Azir|Sun Disk}}) and other [[structures]]
** [[Jungle plants]].
** Units destroyed by 'trampling' such as {{cai|Rampant Growth|Zyra|seeds}}, {{cai|Cell Division|Zac|goo}} or {{cai|Tunnel|Rek'Sai|tunnels}}.
* ''Courage'' will only grant bonus resistances from units killed by '''Garen''' himself. {{ii|Eye of the Herald}} does not count.
* The {{tip|Tenacity}} increase {{tip|stacks additively}} with the ''tenacity reduction'' from {{tip|Brittle}}, but multiplicatively with other sources.

E.name: Judgment
E.description: Garen rapidly spins his sword around his body, dealing physical damage to nearby enemies.
E.tooltip:
Garen rapidly spins his sword for {{ duration }} seconds, dealing {{ totaldamage }} physical damage {{ f1 }} times over the duration. The nearest enemy takes {{ nearestenemybonus*100 }}% increased damage. Champions hit by {{ stackstoshred }} strikes lose {{ shredamount*100 }}% Armor for {{ shredduration }} seconds.

Recast: Garen ends this Ability early.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Garen}} rapidly spins with his sword for a short time, continually dealing {{as|physical damage}} to nearby enemies. He spins more based on his {{sti|as|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: The nearest enemy is dealt increased damage. Enemy {{tip|champions}} hit by enough spins will have {{sti|armor penetration|{{as|reduced armor}}}}.
wiki_detail.blurb3: {{sbc|Recast:}} ''Judgment'' is ended early, with the cooldown {{sti|ah|reduced}} by its remaining duration.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Garen''' rapidly spins his sword around himself 7 (+ 1 per {{tt|{{as|25% '''bonus''' attack speed}}|Only bonus attack speed from item stats and growth (per level)}}) times over 3 seconds, becoming unable to declare basic attacks but gaining {{tip|ghosting}} and dealing {{as|physical damage}} to nearby enemies {{tt|periodically|Spin rate is 3 ÷ number of spins}}. ''Judgment'' can be recast after 1 second while active, and does so automatically after it ends.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|Physical Damage Per Spin|{{ap|4 to 20}} {{as|(+ {{ap|36 to 44}}% AD)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: Enemy champions hit 6 times by ''Judgment'' are inflicted with {{sti|armor penetration|{{as|25% armor reduction}}}} for 6 seconds, with the duration refreshing upon the 7th hit and every 6th hit thereafter.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Judgment'' deals 25% increased damage against the nearest enemy hit.
wiki_detail.description5: ''Judgment'' can {{tip|critical strike|critically strike}} for  {{as|{{critical damage|40|80}} '''bonus''' physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.knockdown:
|notes        = 
*The initial casts count as an ability activation for the purposes of on-cast effects such as {{tip|Spellblade}} and triggering {{ais|Force Pulse|Kassadin}} passive.
**Deactivating the ability manually does not.
* Each spin triggers a stack of {{ri|Conqueror}}.
* For the purpose of moving closer to an enemy when right clicking them, ''Judgment'' also reduces '''Garen's''' {{sti|attack range|link=range}} {{ft|to 100|by 75}} for the duration.
* ''Judgment'' cancels '''Garen's''' last movement command upon ending.
* Each spin deals damage simultaneously to all enemies within its range when the spin is completed.
* The spin animation is capped at once per {{fd|0.2}} seconds, but the amount of ticks will keep on scaling.
* The armor reduction stacks multiplicatively with other percentage armor penetration effects.
{{ct|attack=false|cast=[[File:Decisive_Strike.png|20px|link=Garen#Decisive_Strike]] [[Garen#Decisive_Strike|Decisive Strike]] and [[File:Courage.png|20px|link=Garen#Courage]] [[Garen#Courage|Courage]] are usable. [[File:Demacian_Justice.png|20px|link=Garen#Demacian_Justice]] [[Garen#Demacian_Justice|Demacian Justice]] interrupts.|move=true|items=true|consume=true|spells=true,true,true,false,true|interrupts=death}}

R.name: Demacian Justice
R.description: Garen calls upon the might of Demacia to attempt to execute an enemy champion.
R.tooltip: Garen calls upon the might of Demacia to slay his enemy, dealing {{ basedamage }} plus {{ executedamage*100 }}% missing Health true damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Garen}} strikes a lethal blow to an enemy champion that deals {{as|true damage}} based on the {{as|target's '''missing''' health}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Garen''' calls upon the might of ''Demacia'' onto the target enemy {{tip|champion}}, dealing them {{sti|{{as|true damage}}}} as well as {{tip|true sight|revealing}} them for 1 second at the start of the cast time.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|True Damage|{{ap|150 to 350}} {{as|(+ {{ap|25 to 35}}% of target's '''missing''' health)}}}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* The target will die if they're at least under {{as|{{ap|(25 to 35)/(1+(25 to 35)/100)|round=2}}% '''maximum''' health}} + {{as|{{ap|(150 to 350)/(1+(25 to 35)/100)|round=2}} '''flat''' health}} on top of that. This does not count effects that mitigate [[true damage]], such as {{tip|shield|shields}}.
{{Unit-targeted cancel conditions}}
